languages.text: "Донесения утверждают, что многие металлические ксеносы, украшенные плотью, несут на себе страшные повреждения. Кажется, другие ксеносы неплохо их потрепали".
"Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."
languages.original_text: "Донесения утверждают, что многие металлические ксеносы, украшенные плотью, несут на себе страшные повреждения. Кажется, другие ксеносы неплохо их потрепали".

traits.locale_text: "Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."
"Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."
"Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."

languages.text: 「報告によると、多くの肉を身につけた金属異形体は酷いダメージを受けている。他の異形体が彼らを痛めつけたようだ」
languages.original_text: "Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."

traits.locale_text: 「報告によると、多くの肉を身につけた金属異形体は酷いダメージを受けている。他の異形体が彼らを痛めつけたようだ」

languages.text: «Según los informes, muchos de los xenos metálicos cubiertos de carne muestran graves daños. Se ve que los otros xenos les dieron un buen repaso».
languages.original_text: "Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."

traits.locale_text: «Según los informes, muchos de los xenos metálicos cubiertos de carne muestran graves daños. Se ve que los otros xenos les dieron un buen repaso».

languages.text: “报告显示，许多身披人皮的金属异形受损严重，看来是被别的异形势力狠狠修理过。”
languages.original_text: "Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."

traits.locale_text: “报告显示，许多身披人皮的金属异形受损严重，看来是被别的异形势力狠狠修理过。”

languages.text: "Berichten zufolge sind viele der in Fleisch gehüllten metallenen Xenos schwer verwundet. Offenbar haben ihnen andere Xenos eine ordentliche Abreibung verpasst."
languages.original_text: "Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."

traits.locale_text: "Berichten zufolge sind viele der in Fleisch gehüllten metallenen Xenos schwer verwundet. Offenbar haben ihnen andere Xenos eine ordentliche Abreibung verpasst."

languages.text: "Raporlar, etle süslenmiş metal zenoların çoğunun korkunç hasar belirtileri gösterdiğini söylüyor. Görünüşe göre diğer zenolar onları fena hırpalamış."
languages.original_text: "Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."

traits.locale_text: "Raporlar, etle süslenmiş metal zenoların çoğunun korkunç hasar belirtileri gösterdiğini söylüyor. Görünüşe göre diğer zenolar onları fena hırpalamış."

languages.text: « Selon les rapports, nombreux sont les xénos de métal vêtus de chair à avoir déjà subi des dégâts considérables. Il semble que les autres xénos leur aient donné du fil à retordre. »
languages.original_text: "Reports say that many of the metal xenos adorned with flesh show signs of terrible damage. It seems other xenos have given them a serious beating."

traits.locale_text: « Selon les rapports, nombreux sont les xénos de métal vêtus de chair à avoir déjà subi des dégâts considérables. Il semble que les autres xénos leur aient donné du fil à retordre. »
